name: PostHog Analytics + Feature Flags
description: Integrate PostHog for product analytics and feature flags. Track custom events, define funnels, enable session replay, and use feature flags to roll out features to specific user segments. Self-hostable.

steps.description: Install PostHog browser SDK and Node.js SDK
Create PostHog provider component with posthog-js initialization and user identification
Create track(), identify(), setUserProperties(), and page() wrapper functions
Create isFeatureEnabled(flag, userId) using posthog-node for server-side flag evaluation
Add Bootstrap data to middleware response for SSR feature flags without waterfall

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Event tracking, funnels, session replay, and feature flags — open source
